text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I'm up against Creek? Or because
people have such high expectations for me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
When we watched the Arima Kinen last year, I
could sense so much passion and excitement from
the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Today, that's all gonna be for me—I'll make sure
of it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna drive the crowd wild!
choice_data_list: Victory is yours for the taking, Oguri!
Victory is yours for the taking, Oguri!
